questions.question: What is the name of the employment generation program proposed by KVIC for promoting Agarbatti production?
questions.explanation: Union MSME Minister Nitin Gadkari has approved the employment generation program proposed by Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC) to promote Agarbatti production. Named the ‘Khadi Agarbatti Atma Nirbhar Mission’, the scheme aims to create employment for the unemployed and migrant workers across the country. KVIC will provide Automatic Agarbatti making machines in subsidised prices.

questions.question: Which Institute won the first prize in the Smart India Hackathon-2020?
questions.explanation: Pune-based Defence Institute of Advanced Technology (DIAT), a deemed university under the Defence Ministry’s Department of Defence Research and Development, has won the first prize in the Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2020. SIH is a national-level digital product building competition, jointly organised by the Ministry of Education and AICTE. The DIAT team developed a technology called ‘DRISHTI’ to recognise face, expression and gesture using artificial intelligence (AI).

questions.question: The first Kisan Rail has been flagged off between Maharashtra and which state?
questions.explanation: Union Minister of Agriculture Minister Narendra Singh Tomar and Railway Minister Piyush Goyal virtually flagged off the first ‘Kisan Rail’.’ The First Special Parcel Train will transport perishable goods such as vegetables and fruits between Maharashtra’s Devlali and Bihar’s Danapur Railway station. The train would stop at several stations and pick-up and deliver goods. It will cover a distance of 1519 kilometers in around 32 hours.

questions.question: ‘Conclave on Transformational Reforms in Higher Education’ was organised by Education Ministry along with which institution?
questions.explanation: The Union Education Ministry formerly the HRD Ministry organised ‘Conclave on Transformational Reforms in Higher Education under National Education Policy’ along with the University Grants Commission (UGC). The Prime Minister Narendra Modi delivered the inaugural address at the Conclave through video conferencing. He also highlighted various aspects of the National Education Policy. Union Education Minister Ramesh Pokhriyal also participated in the event.

questions.question: What is the corpus offered by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) to NABARD and NHB, to boost rural lending and affordable housing?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has offered a credit facility of Rs 10000 crore to the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) and the National Housing Bank (NHB). The fund of Rs 5,000 crore each is provided at policy lending rate to the banks, its will be deployed to boost rural lending and affordable housing across the country. Under this facility, small NBFCs and micro-lenders will extend small loans to the poor. Earlier, NABARD got a refinance support of Rs 35,000 crore and NHB got Rs 10,000 crore.

questions.question: Which Indian pharmaceutical industry has partnered with GAVI and the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, to produce 100 million doses of Covid-19 vaccines?
questions.explanation: Pune-based Serum Institute of India has partnered with international vaccine alliance, GAVI and the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation to fast track the production of 100 million doses of COVID-19 vaccines. The vaccines would be developed for India and other low- and middle-income countries. Serum Institute of India (SII) is the world’s largest vaccine manufacturer. It had bagged the contract with AstraZeneca to supply Oxford University’s potential COVID-19 vaccine.

questions.question: When is International Day of the World’s Indigenous Peoples or World Tribal Day celebrated?
questions.explanation: The International Day of the World’s Indigenous Peoples or World Tribal Day is celebrated on August 9 every year. The United Nations General Assembly declared the World Tribal Day in the year 1994. It marks the day of the first meeting of the United Nations Working Group on Indigenous Populations in Geneva in 1982. The day seeks to promote and protect the rights of the indigenous population.

questions.question: A new Railway Museum has been inaugurated at which city of Karnataka?
questions.explanation: Minister of Railways Piyush Goyal and Minister of Coal & Mines Pralhad Joshi inaugurated a new Railway Museum at Hubbali, through video conferencing. Hubli or Hubbali is a city in North Karnataka and the museum is located near the Hubballi Railway Station on Gadag Road. It aims to preserve the heritage of branches of Railways and exhibit the evolution of advanced system in the Railways ecosystem.

questions.question: India’s first Silk Training cum Production Center is to be set up in which state?
questions.explanation: The Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC) is set to open the country’s first Silk Training cum Production Center in the state of Arunachal Pradesh. A school building in the tribal village of Chullyu in the state has been modified into the training cum production center. KVIC will also conduct training of artisans and support the production of Eri Silk, an indigenous silk variety of the North Eastern states.

questions.question: Which Non-Profit organization has tied up with Naukri.com for connecting health care professionals with hospitals?
questions.explanation: ECHO India, a Non-Profit healthcare organization, in association with Naukri.com has launched an initiative named “COVID Health Care Professionals (CHP)”. The initiative aims to tackle the shortage of healthcare professionals during the COVID-19 pandemic by deploying trained healthcare professionals at COVID care centre. It is a platform that connects the professionals who are willing to offer healthcare services with hospitals and other health care facilities.
